title: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output
description: The org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output package is a part of the Hadoop MapReduce library and contains classes for writing data from MapReduce jobs. The package provides a set of classes that implement the RecordWriter interface and are used to write data to output files. The classes in this package collaborate to provide a flexible and extensible framework for writing data from MapReduce jobs. The package follows the architectural pattern of the Hadoop framework, providing a modular and extensible solution for writing data from MapReduce jobs.
raw_response:
TITLE: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output

DESCRIPTION:
The org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output package is a part of the Hadoop MapReduce library and contains classes for writing data from MapReduce jobs. The package provides a set of classes that implement the RecordWriter interface and are used to write data to output files. The classes in this package collaborate to provide a flexible and extensible framework for writing data from MapReduce jobs. The package follows the architectural pattern of the Hadoop framework, providing a modular and extensible solution for writing data from MapReduce jobs.
